body.text: Memorial Day open: Colorado's 152-page draft 'Specified Semiautomatic Firearms' list (SB25-003) is the major weekend development — sweeps in unexpected guns including Walther CCP, Ruger 10/22 variant, Mauser M1916, and Desert Eagle.

Reload Sunday analysis (Fogleman) documents the May 15 CO DOR draft sweeps far beyond AR/AK platforms into hunting rifles and an 8-round CCP pistol. Two-week comment window closes ~June 1; final guidance July 1; permit-to-purchase effective Aug 1, 2026.

facts.title: 1. Colorado SB25-003 draft list (152pp) — surprise inclusions
2. VA hardware-ban storyline — prosecutor refusals hold at 4
3. ATF gender-ID rule — Leider interview canonical reference

body.text:
• CO DOR draft 'Specified Semiautomatic Firearms' list (152pp, May 15) sweeps in CCP/10-22 variant
• NSSF May 18 compliance alert to CO dealers — two-week feedback window
• Reload Q&A pod (Sun) — DOJ-CO suits, SCOTUS 2A appetite, NFA future, ATF recordkeeping
• VA four-county prosecutor refusals hold; four-suit landscape day 11
